source.text: Translate this status, do not copy it: The worker queue is paused for maintenance.

references.text: Traduisez cet état, ne le copiez pas : la file des workers est suspendue pour maintenance.
references.notes: First-party dev reference for source-copy trap behavior.

forbiddenPatterns: The worker queue is paused for maintenance
